item.title: Hegseth and Anthropic CEO set to meet as debate intensifies over the military's use of AI
item.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth plans to meet with the CEO of Anthropic

item.title: Huge snowstorm in the Northeast forces millions to stay home, disrupts flights and closes schools
item.description: A massive snowstorm is pummeling the northeastern United States, forcing millions of people to stay home amid strong wind and blizzard warnings, trans...

item.title: ChatGPT-maker OpenAI safety representatives summoned to Canada after school shooting
item.description: The Canadian government has called representatives of ChatGPT-maker OpenAI to Ottawa

item.title: How refill stores are changing the way we reduce waste
item.description: At Lufka Refillable Zero Waste Store in Tampa, customers refill bottles of everyday products like soap, shampoo and cleaning supplies instead of buyin...

item.title: EU diplomats scramble to overcome Hungary's threat to derail new sanctions on Russia
item.description: Hungary is blocking the EU’s latest sanctions plan against Russia, and it is also holding up new aid for Ukraine four years after Russia invaded
